arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney 'would be up for' Celtic return as Michael Stewart makes estimate for cut price Jota transfer
arts.sum: The Scotland star has been told he has no future at Arsenal and will be available on a free transfer next summer

arts.ttl: Massive Arsenal boost as Nico Williams replacement already known
arts.sum: Athletic Club have identified Championship top scorer Borja Sainz as the man to replace Nico Williams in 2025, according to Spanish media. At least that is according to Sport, which claims that the Bilbao giants have identified Norwich City hotshot Borja Sainz as a replacement for Williams.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'leading Chelsea & Liverpool' in race for Bundesliga star
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly leading Chelsea and Liverpool in the race to sign Egypt international Omar Marmoush from Bundesliga side Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Brentford and Brighton dealt blow in possible January move – Club’s decision communicated to agent
arts.sum: Over the last few months, Brentford and Brighton & Hove Albion have been linked with a move for Genoa midfielder Morten Frendrup. Earlier this month, it was suggested that the player was close to joining Brentford in the summer but the move never materialised. Previous reports said Brighton were an interested party for the player. The post Brentford and Brighton dealt blow in possible January move – Club’s decision communicated to agent appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'Lead Race' to Sign 'Outrageous' Forward who Cannot Stop Scoring
arts.sum: Arsenal have been in the market for an attacker and they continue to be linked with a move for Omar Marmoush

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka transfer value skyrockets amid £37m Arsenal gift to Stan Kroenke and huge injury blow
arts.sum: A dozen Arsenal players have seen their transfer market value drop ahead of the winter window before January despite several players becoming increasingly valuable to the Gunners. Myles Lewis-Skelly has also doubled in value (from £4m to £8m) after Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta entrusted the teenager over this last month.

arts.ttl: Who is Omar Marmoush? Arsenal's January transfer 'target' dubbed the next Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: With that in mind, football.london takes a look at who Marmoush is, his career and why Arteta may want to bring him to the Emirates Stadium. Eintracht Frankfurt star Omar Marmoush is a name Arsenal fans can expect to hear plenty of over the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Thomas Partey Arsenal future decided - Jorginho fear, Barcelona transfer, Mesut Ozil repeat - Sam Truelove - football.london
arts.sum: More importantly for Mikel Arteta, Partey has stayed injury-free for most of the season and has been included in every matchday squad bar one. With Barcelona reportedly among a handful of clubs said to be interested in signing Partey when his deal expires next summer, it could be a vital month or so in terms of the midfielder's future.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Why Arsenal teenager Lewis-Skelly has a big future
arts.sum: Fresh from completing his first 90 minutes in the Premier League against Ipswich Town, on his third successive top-flight start, the 18-year-old looks like he has been playing senior football for years, not a matter of weeks. Indeed, his 96.3 per cent passing accuracy is a competition-best among defenders to have made at least three Premier League starts this season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool sent two-word Bryan Mbeumo transfer warning after Mo Salah demand
arts.sum: Liverpool could potentially be on the lookout for a replacement for Mohamed Salah in the immediate future but one of their potential targets looks unlikely to arrive at Anfield
